TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_K’yang, title = K’yang, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/K’yang} }

S.FORM: alang K'yang ga niya mki sku Girang Keng atu Nango go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 159 buwan, 440 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 423 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 17 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 88%, Amis 1%, Truku 2%, Bunun 1%, Puyuma 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na K'yang hya' ga Kinus. tay 'llaw na K'yang hya' ga Buta. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang K'yang ga niya mki sku Girang Keng atu Nango go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 159 buwan, 440 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 423 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 17 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 88%, Amis 1%, Truku 2%, Bunun 1%, Puyuma 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na K'yang hya' ga Kinus. tay 'llaw na K'yang hya' ga Buta. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kʔjaŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ɣiraŋ keŋ atu naŋo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, truku *%, βunun *%, pujuma *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkjaħuʔ na kʔjaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa kinus~ɕ. taj ʔllaw na kʔjaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa βuta. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
